title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 316.090 - Licenses not granted, when
text:
316.090.  Licenses not granted, when. — No license shall be given for any public amusement or entertainment in any place not constructed or arranged as in this chapter required.
(RSMo 1939 § 14960, A.L. 1949 p. 564) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 13767; 1919 § 10971; 1909 § 10676
